Group project
May 2025
A machine learning-based tool that helps job seekers
optimize their resumes for better chances of passing
ATS and attracting recruiters. It analyzes resumes for
keyword optimization, readability, and ATS
compatibility, offering actionable insights and
improvement suggestions.

ABOUT ME
    As an aspiring Machine Learning enthusiast, I have a basic understanding of
Python and  gaining practical experience with TensorFlow . I have developed simple
predictive models, achieving measurable improvements in forecast accuracy. My
interests include natural language processing and computer vision, and I am
dedicated to continuous learning through online courses and workshops. I am eager
to apply my growing skills and enthusiasm to a dynamic team, contributing to
innovative AI solutions while further developing my expertise.abilesh1067@gmail.com
PROJECTS
Reminder (SIH 24)
Developed a web-based reminder system that automates email
notifications for scheduled tasks.
Designed a user-friendly and responsive UI using HTML and CSS to
enhance accessibility.
Implemented backend logic in PHP to manage user data,
schedule reminders, and trigger automated email notifications.
Integrated MySQL for storing user reminders and ensuring data
persistence.
IPL Score Prediction using ML
 Built a machine learning model using linear regression in Python to predict IPL
match scores.
 Collected and preprocessed historical IPL match data, applying feature
engineering for better accuracy.
 Developed a web-based interface using HTML, CSS, and Flask for user input
and real-time predictions.
 Implemented backend logic in Flask to handle requests and dynamically
display results.
